en.siteDescription: Discover and use Jzero templates for your next project

noResults.title: No templates found
noResults.description: Try adjusting your search or filters

submit.pageSubtitle: Use the GitHub Issue form to submit your template listing. Share the repository, screenshots, usage command, and a short description so maintainers can review it quickly.

prepare.title: Prepare Before You Submit
prepare.description: The issue form is meant for template creators who want maintainers to help review and list a template in the marketplace.
items: Template name, repository URL, and a short project description
Applicable category, tags, and the command used to create the project
Optional online demo, screenshots, or documentation links
Notes about maturity, maintenance status, and supported language versions

review.title: What Happens Next
review.description: After the issue is submitted, maintainers can review the information directly in GitHub and follow up in the same thread.
items: Maintainers confirm the template is complete and accessible
They may ask for missing metadata, docs, or demo details
Once approved, the template can be added to the public listing
Follow-up updates can continue in the same GitHub issue

tips.title: Prefer GitHub-native Submission
tips.description: The static page only acts as a launcher. The actual submission happens in GitHub Issue forms so the review process stays transparent and traceable.

contribution.title: Contribute Your Template
contribution.description: Create and share your template to help more developers start projects quickly.

contribute.pageSubtitle: Contribute your template to the Jzero Template Market

cta.title: Ready to Contribute?
cta.description: Start creating your template and help more developers!

contribution.title: Contribute Your Template
contribution.description: Create and share your template to help more developers start projects quickly.
contribution.pageSubtitle: Contribute your template to the Jzero Template Market
contribution.whatIsDescription: Third-party templates are project templates created and maintained by community developers to help other developers quickly start specific types of projects.
contribution.structureDescription: Each third-party template should contain the following files:
contribution.configFileDescription: Template configuration file is in JSON format with the following fields:
contribution.multilingualDescription: To support Chinese, create a template.zh.json file:
contribution.namingDescription: Use meaningful names, recommended format: purpose-techstack-features
contribution.categoryDescription: Web, API, CLI, Mobile, Desktop, etc.
contribution.tagsDescription: Add 3-8 related tags, including tech stack and project type
contribution.docsDescription: README.md should include project introduction, features, and quick start guide

steps.prepare: Prepare submission: Ensure complete template.json and README.md
steps.create: Create your template in the third_party/ directory

cta.title: Ready to Contribute?
cta.description: Start creating your template and help more developers!

zh.siteDescription: 发现并使用 Jzero 模板来构建你的下一个项目

noResults.title: 未找到模板
noResults.description: 尝试调整搜索或筛选条件

submit.pageSubtitle: 通过 GitHub Issue 表单提交模板上架申请。填写模板仓库、使用命令、功能简介和演示信息，方便维护者快速审核并收录。

cta.primary: 打开 GitHub 申报表单

prepare.title: 提交前请准备
prepare.description: 这个页面只负责引导，真正的申报会在 GitHub Issue 表单里完成，建议你先准备好以下信息。
items: 模板名称、仓库地址，以及一句话介绍
模板分类、标签、初始化命令和适用场景
可选的在线演示、截图、文档链接
维护状态、依赖版本、已知限制等补充说明

review.title: 提交后会发生什么
review.description: Issue 创建后，维护者会直接在 GitHub 中跟进审核流程，沟通记录也会完整保留。
items: 先确认模板仓库、说明文档和命令是否可用
如有缺失信息，会在 Issue 中继续补充沟通
审核通过后，再安排收录到模板市场
后续更新也可以继续在同一个 Issue 中追踪

tips.title: 使用 GitHub 原生表单提交
tips.description: 当前站点是静态站点，页面只提供入口。实际申报采用 GitHub Issue Form，便于流程公开、可追踪、可协作。

contribution.title: 贡献您的模板
contribution.description: 创建并分享您的模板，帮助更多开发者快速启动项目。

contribution.pageSubtitle: 为 Jzero 模板市场贡献您的模板
contribution.whatIsDescription: 第三方模板是由社区开发者创建并维护的项目模板，可以帮助其他开发者快速启动特定类型的项目。
contribution.structureDescription: 每个第三方模板需要包含以下文件：
contribution.configFileDescription: 模板配置文件是 JSON 格式，包含以下字段：
contribution.multilingualDescription: 如果需要支持中文，创建 template.zh.json 文件：
contribution.namingDescription: 使用有意义的名称，推荐格式：用途-技术栈-特性
contribution.tagsDescription: 添加 3-8 个相关标签，包含技术栈和项目类型
contribution.docsDescription: README.md 应包含项目简介、功能特性、快速开始指南
